shinbot_converter_astrbot.name: AstrBot Plugin Converter
shinbot_converter_astrbot.author: ShinBot Team
shinbot_converter_astrbot.description: Bridge layer for running AstrBot-compatible plugins inside ShinBot.

shinbot_plugin_astroassist.name: 晴天钟助手
shinbot_plugin_astroassist.author: NekyuuYa
shinbot_plugin_astroassist.description: 调用 Open-Meteo 获取 ECMWF 云量数据，支持高德地图定位、专业天文指标、雷达回波、海区云图、NMC 台风快讯与 Dapiya 台风云图。

shinbot_plugin_minesweeper.name: Minesweeper
shinbot_plugin_minesweeper.author: ShinBot Contributors
shinbot_plugin_minesweeper.description: Session-scoped chat minesweeper game with command and comma shortcut controls.

shinbot_plugin_renderkit.name: RenderKit
shinbot_plugin_renderkit.author: ShinBot Contributors
shinbot_plugin_renderkit.description: General-purpose HTML/CSS, SVG, GIF and Typst template rendering utilities for ShinBot plugins.
